subhead: A gamified algorithms platform. Real-time duels, guilds, AI mentor, seasonal rewards.

features.title: A platform built for growth
features.subtitle: Not just grinding tasks — beating live opponents and locking in the skill day after day.

pvp.title: Real-time PvP duels
pvp.desc: 1v1 boxes on speed and code quality. Rating-based matchmaking, anti-bot detection, fair timer.

ai.title: AI mock interviews
ai.desc: Tech-interview simulation: algorithms, system design, behavioral. Voice, breakdown and recommendations.

daily.title: Daily kata and streaks
daily.desc: A daily problem, streaks and a weekly report. A habit that compounds rating — while others scroll the feed.

guilds.title: Guilds and seasons
guilds.desc: Team tournaments, leagues, season pass. Progress visible to everyone — including those who hire.

atlas.title: Skill atlas
atlas.desc: Atlas covers topics from hash maps to distributed queues. See where you're strong and where to dig.

podcasts.title: Podcasts and codex
podcasts.desc: Hiring stories, offer breakdowns, summaries. Content that actually helps in interviews.

testimonials.title: What people inside say
testimonials.subtitle: Names and companies are design placeholders. Real cases will appear after public launch.

items.quote: I solved more problems in a month than in half a year on LeetCode. When you're up against a real person, your brain just kicks in differently.
items.name: Alex

items.quote: The AI mock pinpointed exactly the gaps I'd failed on in my last interview. Got the offer on attempt #2.
items.name: Marina

items.quote: Daily kata became my morning ritual. Streak of 87 — and it's clear my explanations got cleaner.
items.name: Dmitri

items.quote: Guilds are the best way to get a team aligned. We code, argue, grow — together.
items.name: Ilya

pricing.title: Start free — grow without limits
pricing.subtitle: All core mechanics are available on Free. Premium — for those who want to go deeper.

free.name: Free
free.desc: Everything you need to get started.

premium.name: Premium
premium.desc: For those aiming at the offer.

final_cta.title: Ready for the interview? Start now.
final_cta.subtitle: Sign-up takes 30 seconds. First duel — within a minute.
